temporal_description:
A wide shot captures a nighttime scene on a wet city street. Three men stand beside a dark, vintage luxury car. The man in the center, wearing a dark suit, gestures with his hand as he speaks to the man on the right, who is dressed in a brown overcoat. The third man stands slightly behind them. The background is a dark, modern cityscape with illuminated buildings and streetlights reflecting on the wet pavement. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the top right corner. The audio opens with a low, tense, and atmospheric musical score, creating a mood of suspense and seriousness.

The camera cuts to a medium close-up of the man in the brown overcoat. He wears glasses and looks slightly to his right with a subtle, knowing expression. The background is dark and out of focus, with the soft, circular glow of city lights creating a bokeh effect. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right.

The shot tightens slightly on the man in the brown overcoat. He turns his head and speaks, his expression becoming more engaged. Another man's shoulder is visible in the foreground on the left. The background remains a dark, blurry cityscape at night. A man speaks in a calm and respectful tone, addressing someone with a formal title. "长官" (Chángguān - Sir). He then continues in a polite, slightly questioning voice, "你好吗？" (Nǐ hǎo ma? - Are you well?). The "风行网" watermark is still present in the top right corner.
